Germany.summary: EU Blue Card for skilled workers; family reunification visas available for spouses and minor children.

United States.summary: H-1B for specialty occupations; B-1/B-2 for business/tourism; family-based and employment-based green card routes.

United Kingdom.summary: Skilled Worker visa points-based system; visitor visas for short stays; student route via licensed sponsors.

Canada.summary: Express Entry for economic immigration; Provincial Nominee Programs; study and work permits.

Australia.summary: Skilled migration via points test; employer-sponsored visas; student and visitor subclasses.

France.summary: Talent Passport for qualified workers; long-stay visas for work, study, and family; Schengen short-stay rules apply.

Japan.summary: Work visas tied to employer sponsorship; highly skilled professional points system; designated activities for specific cases.

Singapore.summary: Employment Pass for professionals; S Pass for mid-skilled workers; Dependant's Pass for family members.
